name: prism-infer-rigor
description: Mandatory Codex workflow and rigor rules for Prism-Infer development.

interface.longDescription: Project-local Codex skill that enforces CLAUDE.md-style recovery, planning, evidence, self-implementation, verification, benchmark integrity, teaching, documentation, and Chinese-first delivery rules for Prism-Infer development.
defaultPrompt: Use Prism-Infer Rigor for this Prism-Infer task and follow the full Plan -> Implement -> Verify -> Teach -> Document workflow.
Audit this Prism-Infer change for evidence, implementation, verification, and documentation gaps.
Recover the Prism-Infer session state, then plan the next task with verification gates.
